column1: Xavier Edwards leads the slate with a strong combination of leadoff role, steady contact skills, and a favorable platoon edge against Andrew Alvarez. Edwards has recorded a hit in over three-quarters of his games, making him a reliable option in a lineup spot that maximizes plate appearances. Freddie Freeman also profiles well with a consistent track record and a slight park boost, while Jarren Duran offers upside in a hitter-friendly environment but with less overall consistency.
